description:
Log in to LibreHealth EHR as admin (password: password). A new provider, 'Dr. Stephen Strange', has joined the clinic. Configure a recurring 'In Office' availability schedule for Dr. Stephen Strange in the Calendar with the following details:
- Provider: Dr. Stephen Strange
- Category: In Office
- Time: 1:00 PM to 5:00 PM (13:00 - 17:00)
- Recurrence: Weekly
- Days: Tuesday and Thursday
- Duration: Indefinite (or at least 1 year)
